utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I mean why , of all people would you want to go out with Chip ? !

emotion_cause.span: 1_why , of all people would you want to go out with Chip ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Look , you and I went to different high schools ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay , that does not help me , because we went to the same high school .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You went to one where you were popular , and you got to ride off Chip motorcycle , and wear his letterman jacket .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I went to one where I wore a band uniform they had to have specially made .

emotion_cause.span: 5_I wore a band uniform they had to have specially made .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: They had to have that specially made ? !

emotion_cause.span: 6_They had to have that specially made ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It was a project for one of the Home Ec classes .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God , they told us that was for the mascot !

emotion_cause.span: 7_It was a project for one of the Home Ec classes .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Back then , I thought that I would never , ever get the chance to go out with a Chip Matthews , and now he is ... he is called me up and asked me out .

emotion_cause.span: 9_now he is ... he is called me up and asked me out .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And the fat girl inside of me really wants to go .

emotion_cause.span: 9_now he is ... he is called me up and asked me out .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , you go out with him .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah . Just , if it is possible , could you leave him somewhere and go have sex with another guy ?
